title: 日本ダービーの後に・二冠達成

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Another victory.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: And another step closer to seizing my dream.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Satsuki Sho already in hand, this makes
two crowns. Symboli Rudolf raises her hand high,
two fingers pointing skyward.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Two crowns claimed. One to go.

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text: Wooooo! Rudolf! Rudolf! Rudolf!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With this victory, a new Derby Champion is
born—and with Rudolf now poised to claim the
Triple Crown, the crowd's excitement can't be
contained.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their elation is infectious, quickly spreading to
every last person...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Including a certain Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Two crowns! Congratulations, President. I must
say, you raced splendidly.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Haha...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's so funny?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oh, nothing. I've just never seen you with your
cheeks so red before.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I'm glad I took part in the Derby for that alone.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Please don't tease me. Is it wrong to get a little
sentimental when a friend accomplishes
something so great?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. I only hope you'll greet me with twice
the enthusiasm after my next race.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You mean...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But of course. My next goal is to challenge the
Kikuka Sho and claim the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next stop, the Kikuka Sho. Symboli Rudolf's goal
is so close I can practically taste it!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Surely you realize that this will strain your
schedule to the limit?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Summer may be coming, but you will have more
press interviews than ever. And naturally, the
student council will be—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: President?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: No, I'm listening. Please, continue.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: With respect, you do look rather tired.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha. Forgive me. Even I can't maintain perfect
form after a race like that.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps you should refrain from student council
work for a little—

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I believe we have already discussed that point.
Let's move on to something more constructive.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
To pick up on your earlier point, the student
council has important work to do come the
summer.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Come now, Trainer. Surely you haven't forgotten.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Every year, the academy holds a summer camp to
help the students improve their racing skills. The
student council helps to organize it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Ah yes, that reminds me. Air Groove, can you
contact the bus company?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We need to change the number of buses we'll be
hiring, and there are also some other issues I want
to discuss.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That being said, the press is outside, and I can
hardly keep them waiting. Let's see now...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'll be back at the academy in two hours. Could
you set up the meeting for when I return?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Of course.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even with the Japanese Derby under her belt,
Symboli Rudolf shows no signs of relaxing her
unforgiving schedule.
